description: Create a GitLab CI configuration that runs RuboCop linting on Ruby files. Use the default Docker image (no explicit image) and define no explicit stages or jobs, but provide a RuboCop configuration that includes all "**/*.rb" files, excludes "test/**/*", "vendor/**/*", and ".bundle/**/*", sets max_files to 5000, enables only safe cops, and specifies the rubocop reporter. No caches, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are defined, and no environment variables or secrets are referenced.
